title: Custom Main Menu
description: This Resource Pack lets add custom Main Menu Background. check the description for more info.
body:
# Info
This resource pack adds an customizable main menu background to personalize the game.
you

## How To Set an custom Background

1. open the resource pack through winrar.
2. goto assets and keep going until you reach the end.
3. add your custom background file eg:"MyBackground.png" to the folder and rename it to "paronama_overlay" then press crtl+s to save then close.
